# ProofPix
> Before-and-after photo app for service professionals

ProofPix helps cleaners, contractors, Airbnb hosts, inspectors, and field teams capture, organize, and share professional before-and-after photo documentation. It keeps work photos separate from your personal gallery and turns job site photos into organized, branded visual proof.

## Features
- Bulk Capture: Shoot before/after photos in sequence without mixing
- Ghost Mode: Overlay previous shot to match angles exactly
- Custom Layouts: Add labels, fonts, colors, and watermarks
- Project Organization: Keep work photos separate from personal gallery
- Drive/Dropbox Linking: Auto-sync to your cloud storage
- Team Uploads: Simple field workflow for crews

## Pricing
- Starter: $0/month - Capture & pair before/after photos, flexible layouts, share individual photos
- Pro: $8.99/month - Bulk sharing, cloud uploads, custom labels & watermark, unlimited projects
- Business: $24.99/month - Up to 5 team members, shared cloud access, consistent team workflows
- Enterprise: $69.99/month - Up to 15 team members, multiple locations & profiles

## Use Cases
- Cleaning & Airbnb: Document room condition before and after each turnover
- Renovation & Construction: Track project progress with organized photo documentation
- Landscaping: Capture yard transformations with consistent angles
- Auto Detailing: Show clients clear before/after results
- Property Inspections: Record conditions with timestamped, organized proof

## Links
- Website: https://www.proofpix.app
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.proofpix.app
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/proofpix/id6754261444
